org.moeaframework.algorithm.single.AggregateObjectiveComparator

Packages that use AggregateObjectiveComparator
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.

  • Uses of AggregateObjectiveComparator in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single that implement AggregateObjectiveComparator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAggregateObjectiveComparator
    Abstract class for implementing comparators based on some weighted aggregate of objective values.
    class 
    LinearDominanceComparator
    Version of the weighted linear aggregate function that supports constraints.
    class 
    LinearObjectiveComparator
    The weighted linear aggregate function.
    class 
    MinMaxDominanceComparator
    Weighted min-max aggregate function that supports constraints.
    class 
    MinMaxObjectiveComparator
    Weighted min-max aggregate function.
    class 
    VectorAngleDistanceScalingComparator
    The vector angle distance scaling aggregate function.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DifferentialEvolution(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
     
    EvolutionStrategy(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, SelfAdaptiveNormalVariation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
     
    GeneticAlgorithm(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the genetic algorithm (GA).

    Constructs a new single-objective algorithm.
